data.title: LG Electronics unveiled new luxury home living solutions at KBIS 2026, including AI appliances and design-led innovations.
data.description: At KBIS 2026, LG Electronics unveiled its updated LG SIGNATURE and SKS lineups, showcasing cutting-edge home solutions. The new products feature AI technology and innovative designs for the kitchen sector. This move is part of LG's strategy to enhance its B2B appliance business in North America. The presentation included a range of premium offerings tailored for builders, highlighting the company’s commitment to this sector. The additions to the lineup aim to meet the increasing demand for smart and stylish appliances. LG's latest introductions reflect its dedication to providing advanced solutions, with a focus on innovation and functionality.

data.title: WaterField Designs launches Trigo Backpack made with EcoPak™ Sailcloth in San Francisco, high-capacity and weather-resistant.
data.description: The Trigo Laptop Backpack, meticulously crafted in San Francisco, combines a sleek design with ample storage capacity and durable, weather-resistant materials perfect for daily commutes and travel. Recently unveiled by WaterField Designs in San Francisco on Feb. 17, 2026, this backpack offers a sophisticated solution for carrying laptops and essentials. Made of lightweight materials, the backpack boasts a slim profile and high functionality for those on the go.

data.title: Suite Studios introduces S3 Native File Streaming for real-time workflows, enabling working on petabyte-scale datasets stored in any S3 compatible environment. Operating natively, it reads and writes files as standard S3 objects. #CloudWorkspace #RealTimeMedia #PetabyteScale
data.description: In Boulder, Suite Studios unveiled S3 Native File Streaming, an enhancement enabling creative teams to collaborate in real time on massive datasets stored in any S3 compatible object storage. With this update, Suite functions directly on object storage, handling files as standard S3 objects. The platform now serves as a streaming and access layer within the storage environment, revolutionizing workflow efficiency. This advancement marks a significant milestone for Suite, offering seamless integration with petabyte-scale data.

data.title: Crypto.com secures AI certification for its new business line, joining others in fast adoption of tech.
data.description: Crypto.com is focusing on AI services as one of its top three business sectors, part of a widespread trend towards integrating this technology.

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Corp. acquires 3,395 acres of Uranium Claims in Wyoming for its expanding Uranium Portfolio.
data.description: In Vancouver B.C. on Feb. 17, 2026, Terra Clean Energy Corp. disclosed that they have obtained 2,068 acres of uranium exploration claims through low-cost staking. These claims are spread across 100 unpatented Bureau of Land Management (BLM) claims. In addition, the company has secured three strategic Wyoming State Leases encompassing 1,327 acres of land. The combined area of the state leases and newly staked claims amounts to 3,395 acres, all fully owned by Terra. This acquisition bolsters Terra's uranium exploration portfolio significantly.

data.title: Isla Pasion in Mexico is the world's top beach in 2026, La Jolla Cove in California is No.1 in the US. New category honors unique coastal treasures.
data.description: The top spot in the world has been claimed by Isla Pasion in Mexico, with La Jolla Cove in California rising to number one in the United States. A new category, "One of a Kind," has been introduced to celebrate the most unique coastal treasures worldwide. These rankings were revealed today by Tripadvisor®, the leading travel guidance platform. The rankings are based on extensive traveler reviews and ratings, showcasing Isla Pasion and La Jolla Cove as the most popular coastal destinations globally and in the U.S., respectively. This announcement comes as a recognition of the beauty and appeal of these destinations, drawing attention to their distinctive charm and allure.

data.title: Infosys partners with Anthropic to bring AI solutions to various industries starting with telecom. Expansion planned, focusing on automation and efficiency.
data.description: A new collaboration in the telecommunications sector has been initiated with the establishment of a specialized Anthropic Center of Excellence. This collaboration is set to expand into other industries such as financial services, manufacturing, and software development. The integration of Infosys Topaz™ and Anthropic's Claude models, including Claude Code, will lead to the automation of intricate workflows and a boost in productivity. This move aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to enhance operational efficiency across various sectors.

data.title: Long-term Bitcoin holders show weakening accumulation, on-chain data suggests $54,000 as next support if $65,000 breaks.
data.description: There is a decline in accumulation by long-term Bitcoin holders, indicated by on-chain data, suggesting $54,000 as the potential next support level if the current $65,000 mark is breached.
